items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Celine New Arrival AA~Mini Square Bag (Headphone Case)
Celine's new mini bag. This year is truly the year of mini bags. Although the capacity isn't huge, the visual and cute appeal are a knockout, accurately capturing the fact that women are visual creatures. Women are just creatures who buy whatever looks good regardless of practicality, hahaha...
Fits lipstick, compact powder, keys
Style No.: 101512 Brown
Size: 11×4×8
Includes original box

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE New Small HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag Must-Have Series! The rounded and smooth curved body looks even like a larger version of the familiar AVA at a glance ~ Celine never misses when they strike 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 117253
Color: Material/Beige Brown
Size: 23x17x21
